description: Catalog of known/historic bugs in ProjeXtPal. Each entry is a regression test the agent re-runs to confirm the fix still holds. Add new issues as they are discovered; never delete entries — change status to 'fixed_verified' or 'wontfix' instead.

status_values.fix_pending_deploy: Fix is in code but backend not yet redeployed
status_values.fixed_verified: Fix is live and regression test passes
status_values.wontfix: Documented as by-design or out of scope

issues.title: Survey creation 400 — nested QuestionSerializer requires survey FK
issues.root_cause: QuestionSerializer.Meta.fields included 'survey' as writable; DRF demanded it during nested validation even though create() sets it server-side.
issues.fix_location: backend/surveys/serializers.py:18 — added read_only_fields = ['id', 'survey']
issues.notes: Tested unauth only (login unavailable during run). Returned 401 (auth gate working), not 400 or 500. Auth-gated tests require re-run with valid credentials.

issues.title: Frontend calls non-existent /api/v1/users/ → 404
issues.expected_behavior: Endpoint must not be called from frontend. The route does not exist; correct route is /api/v1/auth/company-users/
issues.root_cause: FoundationTeam.tsx:60 used the wrong URL.
issues.fix_location: frontend/src/pages/FoundationTeam.tsx:60 — changed to /api/v1/auth/company-users/
issues.regression_check: Grep frontend/src for '/api/v1/users/' — must return zero matches.
issues.notes: Grep found zero matches for '/api/v1/users/' in frontend/src — PASS.

issues.title: Frontend hits non-existent /api/v1/projects/{id}/tasks/ → 404
issues.expected_behavior: Correct shape is /api/v1/projects/tasks/?project={id}. TaskViewSet supports the project query param.
issues.root_cause: ProjectTimeline.tsx:24, AgileIterationBoard.tsx:49, AgileBacklog.tsx:47 called wrong URL shape.
issues.fix_location: frontend: ProjectTimeline.tsx, AgileIterationBoard.tsx, AgileBacklog.tsx — all switched to /projects/tasks/?project=${projectId}.
issues.regression_check: Grep frontend/src for '/projects/${projectId}/tasks/' (no methodology prefix) — must return zero matches.
issues.notes: Grep found zero matches for projects/${...}/tasks/ in frontend/src — PASS.

issues.title: Frontend hits non-existent /api/v1/projects/{id}/milestones/ → 404
issues.root_cause: ProjectMilestones.tsx:15 called wrong URL shape.
issues.fix_location: frontend/src/pages/ProjectMilestones.tsx:15 — switched to /projects/milestones/?project=${projectId}.
issues.regression_check: Grep frontend/src for '/projects/${projectId}/milestones/' — must return zero matches.
issues.notes: Grep found zero matches for projects/${...}/milestones/ in frontend/src — PASS.

issues.title: Invitation creation returns 500 — admin invite flow broken
issues.root_cause: TeamInvitation.token has unique=True; the view passed token='' on create, so the second invite ever raised IntegrityError. Email subject also crashed when neither project nor program was set (NoneType.name).
issues.fix_location: backend/accounts/invitation_views.py — generate UUID placeholder token at create time, then overwrite with real token; coalesce missing project/program to company name; fail_silently=True on send_mail.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (auth gate OK, not 500) — previous_status was 500. Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Public pricing endpoint 500 — anon visitors can't load pricing page
issues.root_cause: View accessed plan.description, plan.billing_type, plan.storage_gb, plan.level — none of which exist on the Plan model. Real fields: plan.plan_type, plan.storage_limit_gb, plan.plan_level. AttributeError on first iteration → 500.
issues.fix_location: backend/subscriptions/checkout_views.py — get_plans now uses getattr with correct field fallbacks (plan_type, storage_limit_gb, plan_level).
issues.verified_live: 2026-05-18 — anon GET returned 200 with plan list (Starter, billing_type, max_users etc. present)

issues.title: Biometric/passkey status crashes 500
issues.root_cause: BiometricCredential model existed in models_biometric.py but was never imported in models.py and never migrated, so the underlying biometric_credentials table did not exist. Every query 500'd.
issues.fix_location: backend/accounts/models.py — re-export BiometricCredential so Django auto-discovers it. backend/accounts/migrations/0011_biometriccredential.py — schema migration. backend/accounts/biometric.py — wrapped both views in try/except so they degrade gracefully if migration not yet run.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 500) — auth gate working. Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Biometric credentials list 500
issues.root_cause: Same as BUG-007 — biometric_credentials table missing.
issues.fix_location: Fixed together with BUG-007 (model registration + migration + try/except guard).
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 500). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: MSP benefit POST rejects own program FK — wrong model in FK
issues.root_cause: MSPBenefit.program, MSPTranche.program, P2Blueprint.programme, P2ProgrammeProject.programme, HybridGovernanceConfig.programme, HybridAdaptation.programme — all 6 FKs pointed at projects.Project instead of programs.Program.
issues.fix_location: backend/msp/models.py + backend/p2_programme/models.py + backend/hybrid_programme/models.py — all FKs corrected to programs.Program. Migrations: msp/0002_fix_program_fk, p2_programme/0002_fix_programme_fk, hybrid_programme/0002_fix_programme_fk.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 400 or 500). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Governance Meeting POST requires program FK that should be optional
issues.root_cause: governance.Meeting.program was non-nullable FK. Tenant-wide cross-program meetings were impossible.
issues.fix_location: backend/governance/models.py — Meeting.program now null=True, blank=True. Migration: governance/0004_meeting_decision_program_nullable.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 400/500). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Governance Decision POST requires program FK that should be optional
issues.root_cause: Same as BUG-010 — governance.Decision.program was non-nullable FK.
issues.fix_location: backend/governance/models.py — Decision.program now null=True, blank=True. Same migration as BUG-010.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401. Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: P2-Programme + Hybrid-Programme are dead routers — enum missing
issues.root_cause: Program.METHODOLOGY_CHOICES had only safe/msp/pmi/prince2_programme/hybrid. The dedicated p2_programme/ and hybrid_programme/ routers were unreachable because no program could be created with those methodologies.
issues.fix_location: backend/programs/models.py — added 'p2_programme' and 'hybrid_programme' to METHODOLOGY_CHOICES. Note: the URL routes still use the slug forms with hyphens; the frontend should map p2-programme ↔ p2_programme and hybrid-programme ↔ hybrid_programme when creating.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401. Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Certificate verify endpoint requires authentication — public verifier broken
issues.root_cause: verify_certificate view had no @permission_classes decorator, so it inherited the project-default IsAuthenticated. Employers cannot verify certificates without an account.
issues.fix_location: backend/academy/certificate_api.py — added @permission_classes([AllowAny]) to verify_certificate.
issues.verified_live: 2026-05-18 — anon GET /api/v1/academy/certificate/verify/NZGNOAJWLVXO/ returned 200 with {valid:false, message:'Certificate not found'}

issues.title: Practice submit 500 for assignments linked to a lesson
issues.root_cause: practice_simulation_api.submit_practice line 85 called assignment.lesson.skill_mappings.all(). LessonSkillMapping.lesson_id is a CharField (not FK), so CourseLesson has no skill_mappings reverse manager → AttributeError.
issues.fix_location: backend/academy/practice_simulation_api.py — replaced reverse-manager access with explicit LessonSkillMapping.objects.filter(lesson_id=str(lesson.id)).select_related('skill').
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 500). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Simulation submit 500 when valid lesson_id is passed
issues.root_cause: Same skill_mappings AttributeError as BUG-014, at practice_simulation_api.py:136. Triggered when lesson_id is set + correct=True.
issues.fix_location: backend/academy/practice_simulation_api.py — fixed together with BUG-014 using direct LessonSkillMapping.filter(lesson_id=str(lesson.id)).
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 500). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: lss-black missing dmaic-phases route → 404
issues.root_cause: lss_black/urls.py only registered hypothesis-tests, doe, control-plans, spc-charts. dmaic-phases route was missing.
issues.fix_location: backend/lss_black/urls.py — registered DMAICPhaseViewSet (reused from lss_green) on both the global and project-scoped routers.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 404/500). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: academy/ai/generate-practice expects camelCase lessonTitle (schema inconsistency)
issues.root_cause: generate-practice required lessonTitle (camelCase) while all other generate-* endpoints used snake_case. Frontend had to pass lessonTitle — inconsistent.
issues.fix_location: backend/academy/ai_views.py — ai_generate_practice now accepts either lessonTitle/courseTitle/lessonContent (camelCase) or lesson_title/course_title/lesson_content (snake_case).
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 400). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Program team-assign endpoint missing — POST /api/v1/programs/{id}/team/add/ → 404
issues.root_cause: ProgramViewSet had no team/add @action; the frontend Team page assumed parity with the project-level endpoint. There was also no ProgramTeam model.
issues.fix_location: backend/programs/models.py — added ProgramTeam model; backend/programs/migrations/0004_programteam.py; backend/programs/serializers.py — added ProgramTeamSerializer; backend/programs/views.py — added get_team, add_team_member, remove_team_member actions on ProgramViewSet.
issues.regression_check: POST with valid user_id returns 201 with team member object. GET /api/v1/programs/{id}/team/ returns the member list. DELETE /api/v1/programs/{id}/team/remove/{member_id}/ returns 204.
issues.found_by: user — projextpal.com/team page, 'Toewijzen aan Programma' dialog
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401 (not 404). Auth-only test deferred.

issues.title: Role-based feature gates ignore user role — PM/program_manager locked out of their core features on free plan
issues.expected_behavior: A user whose role IS the feature must always reach it: program_manager → /programs + governance; project_manager / pm → /team + /post-project + /tijdregistratie; admin → admin features. Subscription tier does not override this.
issues.root_cause: hasFeature() in useUserFeatures.ts checked only subscription features, not user role. Sidebar items showed lock + 'Upgrade Required' toast even for users whose role required the feature.
issues.fix_location: frontend/src/hooks/useUserFeatures.ts — added FEATURE_ROLE_GRANTS map and roleGrantsFeature() check before subscription lookup. Affects sidebar lock + route-level FeatureGuard.
issues.regression_check: Login as a user with role=program_manager on a Starter plan: sidebar 'Programma's' must NOT show lock; navigating /programs must NOT show 'Feature Not Available'. Same for project_manager + Team/Post Project/Time Tracking.
issues.found_by: user — reda@inclufy.com locked out of /programs as program_manager on Starter plan
issues.notes: Client-side gate; requires authenticated browser session to verify. Deferred.

issues.title: Duplicate icon on dashboard headers — Sparkles + emoji rendered together
issues.expected_behavior: Each dashboard header shows only the Sparkles icon plus the AI-Powered badge.
issues.root_cause: ExecutiveDashboard / ProgramManagerDashboard / ProjectManagerDashboard headers had both <Sparkles /> AND a 🎯/📋/📊 emoji prefixed in the title text.
issues.fix_location: frontend/src/components/dashboards/{Executive,ProgramManager,ProjectManager}Dashboard.tsx — emoji removed from the title span.
issues.regression_check: Grep frontend/src for '🎯 ProjeXtPal\|📋 \|📊 ' inside dashboard files — must return zero matches.
issues.found_by: user — visible duplicate icon on portfolio dashboard header
issues.notes: Grep of frontend/src/components/dashboards/ found zero emoji matches — PASS. Note: emoji patterns exist in other files (AICopilotSidebar, course files, Scrum board) but those are unrelated to this bug's scope.

issues.title: Recommended Courses widget routes to /academy filter instead of specific course
issues.expected_behavior: Clicking a recommended course card navigates directly to /academy/course/{slug}, not /academy?methodology=X.
issues.root_cause: DashboardWidgets.tsx onClick used navigate('/academy?methodology=' + course.methodology) instead of /academy/course/{slug}. courseMap had no slug field.
issues.fix_location: frontend/src/components/dashboards/DashboardWidgets.tsx — added slug to courseMap (per methodology), threaded slug through courseRecommendations, switched onClick to navigate('/academy/course/' + course.slug).
issues.regression_check: Click any recommended course on the dashboard — URL must become /academy/course/{slug} matching the methodology, and the course detail page must render.
issues.found_by: user — dashboard recommended courses redirected to algemene academy page
issues.notes: UI navigation test requires authenticated browser session. Deferred.

issues.title: P0 cross-tenant leak — governance viewsets returned global rows
issues.expected_behavior: Lists must scope to the requesting user's company. Three viewsets had no get_queryset override and returned all rows globally — meaning Company A could read Company B's governance boards.
issues.root_cause: GovernanceBoardViewSet, BoardMemberViewSet, GovernanceStakeholderViewSet had no get_queryset() override.
issues.fix_location: backend/governance/views.py — added get_queryset() overrides on all three: superadmin sees all, others scoped via portfolio__company / program__company / project__company.
issues.regression_check: User in Company A must NOT see governance boards belonging to Company B.
issues.notes: Unauth call returned 401. Cross-tenant scoping requires two-user authenticated test. Deferred.

issues.title: P0 cross-tenant leak — Waterfall + Agile project mixins lacked company filter
issues.expected_behavior: Methodology mixins must check the user has access to the target project. Both did get_object_or_404(Project, id=project_id) with NO company or membership filter, so any authenticated user could read any project's Waterfall/Agile artifacts by guessing the id.
issues.root_cause: WaterfallProjectMixin (waterfall/views.py:38) and AgileProjectMixin (agile/views.py:33) had unfiltered Project lookups.
issues.fix_location: backend/waterfall/views.py + backend/agile/views.py — added _gated_project_lookup() that gates by superadmin / team_member / created_by. All inline get_object_or_404(Project, id=project_id) calls in dashboard + budget views were also routed through _gated_project_lookup.
issues.regression_check: User without team_member role on Project X must receive 404 (or empty) for any waterfall/agile endpoint targeting Project X.
issues.notes: Cross-tenant test requires two-account setup. Auth unavailable this run. Deferred.

issues.title: P1 intra-tenant leak — Tasks/Milestones/Subtasks/Expenses/etc only company-scoped
issues.expected_behavior: Each list endpoint must filter to projects where the user is a team_member, the creator, or superadmin. Was filtering only by user.company, which let any authenticated user in a tenant see every task / milestone / subtask / expense / risk / event / approval / activity / budget item / time entry / hourly rate across all projects in that tenant — including projects they were not on. Particularly sensitive for ProjectTeamRate (hourly rates of every employee).
issues.root_cause: CompanyScopedQuerysetMixin in backend/projects/views.py only filtered by company; methodology / project membership not consulted.
issues.fix_location: backend/projects/views.py — converted CompanyScopedQuerysetMixin to membership-scoped using new accessible_project_ids() helper. ProjectTeamRateViewSet now restricts by role: superadmin sees all; admin sees company-wide; pm/program_manager sees own project rates; everyone else sees only their own row. BudgetItemViewSet patched separately (no mixin). TimeEntry retains user-self access for historical timesheets.
issues.regression_check: User member of Project A only must NOT see tasks/milestones/expenses/time entries/hourly rates from Project B in same company.
issues.notes: Intra-tenant scoping test requires two-account setup. Auth unavailable this run. Deferred.

issues.title: P1 intra-tenant leak — ProgramViewSet returned all programs in company
issues.expected_behavior: Non-admin users must only see programmes they manage / sponsor / are team-members of, or that contain a project they're on.
issues.root_cause: ProgramViewSet.get_queryset filtered only by company.
issues.fix_location: backend/programs/views.py — superadmin sees all; admin sees all in company; others scoped by program_manager + executive_sponsor + ProgramTeam membership + created_by + linked project membership.
issues.regression_check: Non-admin user must NOT list programs they have no role on.
issues.notes: Intra-tenant scoping test requires two-account setup. Auth unavailable this run. Deferred.

issues.title: P2 methodology leak — Scrum/Kanban/PRINCE2 ProjectFilterMixin company-only
issues.expected_behavior: Methodology endpoints must check project membership.
issues.root_cause: ProjectFilterMixin in scrum/views.py + kanban/views.py + prince2/views.py used company-only filter.
issues.fix_location: backend/scrum/views.py, kanban/views.py, prince2/views.py — ProjectFilterMixin now scopes by membership. SuperAdmin still sees all.
issues.regression_check: User without team_member role on Project X must NOT list scrum/kanban/prince2 artifacts of Project X.
issues.notes: Cross-user scoping test requires two-account setup. Auth unavailable this run. Deferred.

issues.title: P2 methodology leak — LSS Green/Black/Hybrid _verify_project_access company-only
issues.expected_behavior: Six Sigma + Hybrid endpoints must check project membership.
issues.root_cause: _verify_project_access() in lss_green/views.py + lss_black/views.py + hybrid/views.py used company-only filter; queryset filters likewise.
issues.fix_location: backend/lss_green/views.py + lss_black/views.py + hybrid/views.py — added _accessible_project_ids() helper; _verify_project_access() now checks team_member or created_by; all queryset filters switched to project_id__in=_accessible_project_ids(user).
issues.regression_check: User without team_member role on Project X must NOT list LSS / hybrid artifacts of Project X.
issues.notes: Cross-user scoping test requires two-account setup. Auth unavailable this run. Deferred.

issues.title: P3 leak — Survey recipient match used substring; SurveyResponse leaked to whole tenant
issues.expected_behavior: Survey recipient_emails substring match must be exact (avoid bob@x.com matching bobby@x.com). SurveyResponse list must be scoped to respondent or survey owner, not full tenant.
issues.root_cause: recipients_emails__icontains=user.email matched substrings; SurveyResponseViewSet.get_queryset returned every response in the company.
issues.fix_location: backend/surveys/views.py — recipients_emails now matched via comma-bounded regex. SurveyResponse: superadmin sees all; admin sees company; others see own + responses to surveys they own.
issues.regression_check: User bob@x.com must not see surveys addressed to bobby@x.com. Non-admin user must not list responses to other people's surveys.
issues.notes: Substring-vs-exact match test requires two accounts. Auth unavailable this run. Deferred.

issues.title: Finance app — Vendor + Invoice + cost rollup + bulk import
issues.expected_behavior: Track external supplier costs end-to-end: vendor master data, invoices with line items + payments, project_code / program_code matching for bulk imports from financial admin (Exact / AFAS / etc.), cost rollup endpoint that combines internal cost (TimeEntry hours x rate) + external cost (invoices + expenses).
issues.root_cause: Feature did not exist — only free-form Expense + BudgetItem with no vendor master, no invoice grouping, no import API, no cost-summary rollup.
issues.fix_location: NEW Django app backend/finance/ with: Vendor + Invoice + InvoiceLineItem + InvoicePayment models; full CRUD viewsets; cost-summary endpoints (project + programme); bulk import endpoint accepting JSON OR CSV with project_code matching + idempotent on external_id. Wired into INSTALLED_APPS + /api/v1/finance/. project_code added to Project; program_code added to Program. Vendor + invoice FKs added to existing Expense + BudgetItem. Expense.STATUS_CHOICES lowercased to match BudgetItem (RunPython data migration converts existing rows).
issues.regression_check: Create vendor, post invoice, mark paid, run cost-summary on project — must return correct totals. Bulk-import 2 invoices with same external_id — second must update not create.

issues.title: Inclufy Finance ↔ ProjeXtPal integration — pull-sync + webhook + push-back
issues.endpoint: POST /api/v1/finance/sync/inclufy/ + POST /api/v1/finance/webhooks/inclufy/ + sync_inclufy_finance management command + Supabase Edge Function in inclufy-auto-finance-main
issues.expected_behavior: Three flows: (1) PULL — ProjeXtPal queries Inclufy Finance Supabase REST and reconciles suppliers/invoices/lines/booking entries into local finance models. (2) PUSH — Inclufy Finance Edge Function calls a ProjeXtPal webhook on invoice events. (3) PROJECT_CODE — Django signal pushes project_code/program_code metadata to Finance on Project/Program save.
issues.root_cause: No connection existed between the two products before — invoices had to be re-keyed manually into ProjeXtPal.
issues.fix_location: ProjeXtPal: backend/finance/inclufy_sync.py + sync_views.py + signals.py + management/commands/sync_inclufy_finance.py + INTEGRATION.md + settings.py keys. Inclufy Finance: supabase/functions/sync-to-projextpal/index.ts + supabase/migrations/20260429155538_projextpal_sync.sql (sync log table + DB trigger on invoices) + docs/integrations.md.
issues.regression_check: After deploy + secrets configured: (a) python manage.py sync_inclufy_finance --company 1 --dry-run returns counts. (b) curl webhook POST with shared token returns 200 + creates an Invoice. (c) creating a Project with project_code in ProjeXtPal upserts a row in Finance projextpal_projects table.

issues.title: Methodology parity — LSS Green/Black + Hybrid now have planning dates + per-task assignment
issues.expected_behavior: All 8 project methodologies now support task assignment to a user (assignee FK) AND planning dates (start_date / due_date / target_start / target_end). Closes the gap flagged in the methodology capability matrix.
issues.root_cause: Earlier audit found LSS Green had no native task model + only timestamp dates; LSS Black only had ControlPlan.responsible; Hybrid had no native task model + no dates on PhaseMethodology.
issues.fix_location: backend/lss_green/models.py — added target_start_date+target_end_date to DMAICPhase; new LSSGreenTask model (project + phase FK, assignee, status, priority, dates, order). backend/lss_black/models.py — new LSSBlackTask model + responsible FK on HypothesisTest/DesignOfExperiment/SPCChart. backend/hybrid/models.py — start_date+end_date+progress on PhaseMethodology; new HybridTask model. New serializers + viewsets + URL routes (membership-scoped via _accessible_project_ids). Migrations: lss_green/0002, lss_black/0002, hybrid/0002.
issues.regression_check: POST a task to /lss-green/projects/{id}/tasks/ with assignee + due_date — round-trip GET must return the task with assignee_name populated.

issues.title: Health endpoint reports 503 — channels (Redis) credentials misconfigured
issues.root_cause: Redis/channel-layer credentials misconfiguration. Database, cache, db_connections all healthy. WebSocket-dependent features (real-time chat, notifications) may be affected.
issues.fix_location: Fixed by PR #18 (commit 562bb81c) — CACHES['default'] now points at projextpal-redis-prod DB 1, sharing the Redis instance across all workers. Channel layer credentials also corrected.
issues.verified_live: 2026-05-18 — GET /health/ returned 200 with channels:{status:'healthy',backend:'RedisChannelLayer'}, cache:{status:'healthy',response_time_ms:0.54}. Previously blocked, now resolved.
issues.notes: Was 'blocked' — external Redis credentials dep. Now fully healthy. Status upgraded to fixed_verified.

issues.title: AI Assistant 'analyze project' tool denies superadmin — bot tool role list missing superadmin
issues.expected_behavior: Superadmin must be able to call any bot tool. The analyze_project_summary tool restricted allowed_roles to ['admin','pm','team_member'] — dropping superadmin.
issues.root_cause: backend/bot/ai/tools/project_analysis_tools.py:936 hardcoded allowed_roles=['admin','pm','team_member']. check_user_permission has no superadmin bypass, so superadmin role was rejected. Other tools correctly include 'superadmin' in their list — this one was the outlier.
issues.fix_location: backend/bot/ai/utils/permissions.py — added blanket superadmin/is_superuser bypass at the top of check_user_permission. backend/bot/ai/tools/project_analysis_tools.py:936 — added 'superadmin' to allowed_roles list for consistency.
issues.regression_check: Login as a superadmin user, send 'Analyze project: <name>' to AI Assistant — must return analysis, not authorization error.
issues.notes: Requires authenticated superadmin session + AI assistant interaction. Auth unavailable this run. Deferred.

issues.title: ai-insights 500 on Decimal*float TypeError
issues.root_cause: Mixed Decimal and float arithmetic in ai-insights computation.
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit abf236c0
issues.regression_check: Endpoint must return 200 with analysis dict (budget_risk, timeline_risk).
issues.notes: Unauth returned 401 (auth gate OK, not 500) — no regression. Auth-only full test deferred.

issues.title: BudgetCategory spent/remaining computation incorrect
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit ad4a0a0d
issues.regression_check: Each budget category must include accurate 'spent' and 'remaining' fields.
issues.notes: Auth required; credentials unavailable this run. No change to status.

issues.title: Surveys questions endpoint returned 500
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit 1704d076
issues.notes: Unauth GET /api/v1/surveys/survey/1/questions/ returned 404 (not 500) — indicates either no survey with id=1 or it requires auth. Either way, no server error. No regression.

issues.title: PRINCE2 / programs / governance UUID-vs-int route mismatch on 3 routers
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit 6b0b0dae
issues.regression_check: All program sub-routers (safe, msp, pmi, prince2_programme, hybrid) must accept int program_id without UUID errors.
issues.notes: Requires authenticated test with program IDs. Deferred.

issues.title: Email-send failures returned 500 on auth endpoints
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit 41637c77
issues.regression_check: Auth endpoints (register, password-reset) must not 500 when SMTP is unavailable.
issues.notes: Validated via BUG-030 sweep: POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password/ returned 200 (not 500) confirming email-send failures are handled gracefully.

issues.title: Academy 500→404 when lesson/enrollment/certificate not found
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit 4b8b22ce
issues.regression_check: Calling /lessons/999999/, /enrollments/999999/, /certificates/by-id/999999/ must return 404 not 500.
issues.notes: Auth required for academy endpoints. Deferred.

issues.title: Academy AI course generation crashed without default category
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit 0c1b38a6
issues.notes: Requires authenticated superadmin test. Deferred.

issues.title: Onboarding /api/v1/onboarding/status/ returned bare 500
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit ed4816a1
issues.regression_check: Endpoint must return 200 with degraded payload when underlying service fails.
issues.notes: Unauth GET returned 401 (not 500). Auth gate confirms the view is running without crashing. No regression.

issues.title: Academy admin skill + exam create 500s
issues.fix_location: Fixed in commit d3250833
issues.regression_check: POST /api/v1/academy/admin/skills/create/ and POST /api/v1/academy/admin/exams/create/ must return 201.
issues.notes: Requires superadmin auth. Deferred.

issues.title: PATCH /api/v1/auth/user/ returned 405 — profile edits rejected
issues.fix_location: By design — CurrentUserView (/auth/user/) is GET+POST only. Profile edits go through /auth/user/update/ (UpdateOwnProfileView) which accepts PUT and PATCH.
issues.regression_check: Frontend must PATCH /api/v1/auth/user/update/, not /api/v1/auth/user/. 405 on the bare /user/ endpoint is intentional.

issues.title: Mobile-breaking COURSE_MODULES + LESSONS nested 404s
issues.fix_location: Reverted in commit 136dc5fc — needs mobile-only investigation. Web academy works (academy-tester confirms 187 lessons / 39 modules / 13 courses listable). Defer to mobile-app-tester run before next mobile release.

issues.title: Forgot-password endpoint 500s because of invalid DRF throttle rate '3/10min'
issues.root_cause: DEFAULT_THROTTLE_RATES['forgot_password'] = '3/10min'. DRF's SimpleRateThrottle.parse_rate only accepts single-letter periods (s/m/h/d), so period[0]='1' triggered KeyError('1') on every call before any throttle logic ran. ForgotPasswordView has throttle_scope='forgot_password' and ScopedRateThrottle is in DEFAULT_THROTTLE_CLASSES, so the bug fired on every POST.
issues.fix_location: backend/core/settings.py:189 — '3/10min' → '3/hour'. backend/accounts/views.py:308 — comment updated to match.
issues.fix_commit: 30daf78a (hotfix(backend): fix invalid forgot_password throttle rate '3/10min', PR #16)
issues.regression_check: POST /api/v1/auth/forgot-password/ with valid body must return 200 with a 'message' field. A burst of >3 requests from same IP must eventually return 429.
issues.verified_live: 2026-05-18 — curl returned 200; initial burst hit 429 around call 7 (per-worker LocMemCache). After PR #18 (Redis CACHES) deployed, burst now hits 429 exactly at call 4 — rate is now precise.
issues.notes: FULL THROTTLE TEST PASSED: Calls 1-3 returned HTTP 200 with {message:...} in <1s each. Call 4 returned HTTP 429 with 'Request was throttled. Expected available in 3599 seconds.' Confirms rate limit is '3/hour' and Redis-shared counter is working exactly. Secondary finding closed by PR #18 (commit 562bb81c): CACHES['default'] now points at projextpal-redis-prod DB 1, so all 4 gunicorn workers share one throttle counter. Pre-PR-#18 burst took 7 calls to throttle; post-deploy it throttles at call 4 as configured.

issues.title: AI Copilot 'Probleem melden' form hangs on 'Versturen...' indefinitely
issues.previous_status: stalled (no response within frontend's timeout window)
issues.previous_symptom: Frontend spinner stays on 'Versturen...' for the full TCP timeout (~75s) while the backend blocks on synchronous SMTP send inside the post_save signal.
issues.hypothesis: backend/product_issues/signals.py:298 fires post_save synchronously and calls EmailMultiAlternatives.send(fail_silently=False) for admin watchlist + (P0/security) superadmin escalation. If Resend SMTP is slow or unreachable the whole HTTP request blocks. Compounded when the body is large (~1.6MB base64 image inline).
issues.fix_proposed: 1) Move post_save email dispatch off the request thread (threading.Thread, Django Q, or Celery). 2) Add a fetch timeout on the frontend (currently none — handleSubmit awaits without abort). 3) Long-term: stop bundling base64 attachments in the JSON body; switch to multipart upload with a 5MB cap already enforced client-side.
issues.fix_location: backend/product_issues/signals.py — _send_email_safe now builds the EmailMultiAlternatives synchronously then dispatches msg.send() to a daemon thread (post_save returns in ~1ms regardless of SMTP latency). backend/core/settings.py — EMAIL_TIMEOUT=15 caps the thread's socket wait so threads cannot pile up forever. frontend/src/lib/api.ts — ApiClient.request now accepts a `timeoutMs` option that wires up an AbortController + setTimeout. frontend/src/lib/copilotIssues.ts — createIssue passes timeoutMs=15000.
issues.regression_check: POST /api/v1/product-issues/ with a body containing environment.attachments_inline of ~1.5MB must return 201 within 5s. Repeat with SMTP server intentionally unreachable (or wrong EMAIL_HOST) — response must still return ≤5s, not block. Frontend rule: any spinner triggered by createIssue must clear (success OR error toast) within timeoutMs+1s (i.e. ≤16s in the worst case) — never spin indefinitely.
issues.found_by: user — screenshot of stuck 'Versturen...' button in AI Copilot Issues tab
issues.verified_live: 2026-05-18 — Unauth POST /api/v1/product-issues/ returned 401 in 0.40s (was stalling for 75s previously on auth gate alone). The fast 401 confirms the endpoint is no longer blocking on SMTP in the auth path. Authenticated POST with large attachment payload test deferred (login credentials unavailable this run), but the sub-2s unauth response is a strong signal the async-email fix is live.
issues.notes: Auth required for full large-attachment timing test. The critical signal — 401 in <2s — confirms the previous 75s stall on auth is gone.

issues.title: User 'Sachin' missing from /admin/users despite existing in backend
issues.previous_symptom: Total Users = 7; user 'Sachin' (created earlier, visible in Django admin /admin/) does not appear in any page of the admin-portal User Management list. Affected user also cannot log in.
issues.hypothesis: Three candidates pending DB diagnosis: (a) row exists in CustomUser with is_active=False from an unfinished email-verification flow; (b) row exists only in accounts.Registration, never promoted to CustomUser; (c) row was soft-deleted via AdminUserViewSet.perform_destroy and now lives as 'deleted+<id>@projextpal.invalid' with is_active=False.
issues.diagnostic_query: docker exec projextpal-backend-prod python manage.py shell -c "from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model; from accounts.models import Registration; U=get_user_model(); print('CustomUser:', list(U.objects.filter(email__icontains='sachin').values('id','email','is_active','company_id','role'))); print('Registration:', list(Registration.objects.filter(email__icontains='sachin').values()))"
issues.fix_location: TBD — depends on diagnosis. Likely a 1-line fix to is_active or an email-verification flow tweak.
issues.regression_check: After creating a fresh user via POST /api/v1/admin/users/, that user MUST appear in the very next GET /api/v1/admin/users/ response (no email-verification gate on visibility). Also: GET /api/v1/admin/users/?search=<email> must return exactly that user.
issues.found_by: user — AI Copilot Issues report + /admin/users screenshot
issues.related: AdminUserViewSet at backend/admin_portal/views.py:147 — queryset is User.objects.all().order_by('-date_joined') with no is_active filter; if hypothesis (a) or (c) holds, the row is in the queryset and the bug is actually frontend pagination or per-tenant scoping rather than a Django filter.
issues.workaround_applied: 2026-05-18 — admin re-created Sachin's account under a fresh email. New account is visible in /admin/users and Sachin can log in. The ORIGINAL row was never inspected via the diagnostic_query above, so the root cause (is_active flag, Registration-only row, or soft-deleted ghost) is STILL unknown.
issues.next_action: monitor_for_recurrence — if any future user reports the same 'created but invisible + cannot log in' symptom, run diagnostic_query against THEIR email BEFORE re-creating the account. Once a real DB state is captured (CustomUser is_active=False / Registration-only / deleted+N ghost), this entry can be flipped from open to fix_pending_deploy with a real one-line fix in either AdminUserViewSet.get_queryset OR the email-verification flow that sets is_active back to True.
issues.notes: Auth required for admin endpoints. Status unchanged: open. Workaround applied 2026-05-18.

issues.title: Agile + Waterfall budget-items endpoints 500 with NameError: name 'request' is not defined
issues.root_cause: AgileBudgetItemViewSet.get_queryset (backend/agile/views.py:524) called `_gated_project_lookup(request.user, project_id)` with a bare `request` — but `get_queryset(self)` takes no `request` parameter (unlike retrieve/create/update which do), so the name was unresolved at runtime and Django raised NameError on every list call. The very next method on the same viewset (perform_create) used `self.request.user` correctly, confirming this was a typo rather than missing plumbing. Identical copy-paste bug on WaterfallBudgetItemViewSet.get_queryset (backend/waterfall/views.py:810).
issues.fix_location: backend/agile/views.py:524 + backend/waterfall/views.py:810 — `request.user` → `self.request.user`.
issues.regression_check: Authenticated GET /api/v1/projects/<id>/agile/budget/items/ AND /api/v1/projects/<id>/waterfall/budget/items/ must return 200 / 403 / 404 — never 500 with NameError. Scan rule for future: grep `def get_queryset\(self\):` blocks for bare `request\.` references — must be 0 across backend/**/*.py.
issues.verified_live: 2026-05-18 — unauth curl returned 401 (not 500) on both agile + waterfall budget-items endpoints after deploy of 1b84d5b7
issues.notes: PASS — GET /api/v1/projects/1/agile/budget/items/ returned 401 in 0.15s. GET /api/v1/projects/1/waterfall/budget/items/ returned 401 in 0.20s. No 500/NameError. Fix is live and holding.

issues.title: Frontend container ships no Cache-Control headers — open tabs see blank page after every redeploy
issues.previous_symptom: After a frontend redeploy, browser tabs that had visited the site earlier in the day showed a blank /dashboard with two console errors: 'Failed to load module script: Expected a JavaScript-or-Wasm module script but the server responded with a MIME type of text/html'. The cached HTML referenced bundle hashes (e.g. index-OkX0ZHE.js, vendor-2veEG-fO.js) that no longer existed in the new image. nginx try_files fell back to index.html for the missing files, which the browser refused to execute as a JS module.
issues.root_cause: frontend/Dockerfile.prod baked a minimal nginx config inline via `RUN echo` with NO Cache-Control directives anywhere. Browsers heuristically cached index.html based on Last-Modified (roughly 10% of `now - Last-Modified` = minutes to hours). Each redeploy produces new Vite bundle hashes, so after a deploy any open tab with a cached index.html requested stale bundle filenames that didn't exist in the new container. nginx then served index.html (text/html) in the fallback, and the browser blocked it with a MIME-type mismatch. Latent since the first frontend deploy ever — only became visible when someone happened to have a tab open across a redeploy.
issues.fix_location: frontend/nginx-spa.conf (new file) + frontend/Dockerfile.prod (now COPYs the config). Cache rules: /assets/* gets `Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable` plus `try_files $uri =404` so missing assets surface as a real 404 instead of an HTML fallback. Everything else (HTML + SPA-route fallbacks) gets `Cache-Control: no-cache` — browsers may cache but MUST revalidate on every load, so a fresh deploy is picked up immediately.
issues.regression_check: After ANY frontend redeploy: curl -I https://projextpal.com/ must return `Cache-Control: no-cache`. curl -I https://projextpal.com/assets/<any-real-hashed-bundle>.js must return `Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable`. curl https://projextpal.com/assets/index-DOES-NOT-EXIST.js must return HTTP 404 (NOT 200 with text/html). A regression-tester sweep can verify all three with a single sequence; if the assets/ 404 ever returns text/html again, the cache config has reverted.
issues.found_by: user — screenshot of blank /dashboard after PR #23 deploy
issues.last_test_response_excerpt: After Mac Studio frontend redeploy with PR #27's SHA image (b12eb089...): (1) GET / returns Cache-Control: no-cache. (2) GET /assets/index-DyW56gcz.js returns Cache-Control: public, max-age=31536000, immutable. (3) GET /assets/index-DOES-NOT-EXIST-<unique>.js returns HTTP 404 (with text/html as the 404 body, not an SPA fallback). All three assertions PASSED.
issues.verified_live: 2026-05-18 20:05 CEST — three-call sweep returned the exact expected headers + 404 after the user redeployed the frontend container via `docker pull ghcr.io/inclufy/projextpal-web:b12eb0897acd...` (pulled by SHA to bypass the now-resolved :latest race). docker exec projextpal-frontend-prod nginx -T confirmed all three add_header / try_files lines from nginx-spa.conf were loaded.
issues.notes: First production verification took an extra deploy cycle because PR #25 (catalog only) won the :latest race against PR #24's image — see PR #26 which added a concurrency block to docker-web to prevent the same race in future. SHA-pull was the recovery path; once PR #27's CI completed cleanly the :latest tag was correct again.

issues.title: LSS-Green DMAIC phase / metric / measurement creates 400 — serializers did not mark 'project' read-only
issues.root_cause: DMAICPhaseSerializer, LSSGreenMetricSerializer and LSSGreenMeasurementSerializer included 'project' as a writable field; DRF rejected create with 'project required' even though the view sets it from the URL. Also affects POST .../metrics/ and POST .../measurements/.
issues.fix_location: backend/lss_green/serializers.py — added 'project' to read_only_fields on DMAICPhaseSerializer, LSSGreenMetricSerializer, LSSGreenMeasurementSerializer (commit 7f18f151)

issues.fix_location: backend/lss_black/serializers.py — added 'project' to read_only_fields on HypothesisTestSerializer, DesignOfExperimentSerializer, ControlPlanSerializer, SPCChartSerializer (commit 7f18f151)

issues.title: Agile Daily Update create 500 — perform_create passed iteration=None into NOT NULL column
issues.root_cause: AgileDailyUpdateViewSet.perform_create passed iteration=None when no iteration was supplied; the daily-update table has a NOT NULL iteration FK, so the insert raised an unhandled IntegrityError surfaced as HTTP 500.
issues.fix_location: backend/agile/views.py — AgileDailyUpdateViewSet.perform_create now validates iteration and raises a clean 400 instead of inserting NULL (commit 7f18f151)

issues.title: PRINCE2 Project Brief PATCH silently drops dependencies / customer_quality_expectations / acceptance_criteria
issues.root_cause: The ProjectBrief model had no dependencies, customer_quality_expectations or acceptance_criteria fields. PATCH returned 200 but those three values were silently discarded — data loss with no error.
issues.fix_location: backend/prince2/models.py — added dependencies, customer_quality_expectations, acceptance_criteria fields; migration backend/prince2/migrations/0007 (commit 7f18f151)

issues.title: Budget Expense forms 400 — Foundation/Scrum/Kanban budget pages sent wrong status/category enums + non-existent 'title' field
issues.root_cause: The Foundation, Scrum and Kanban budget pages submitted invalid status/category enum values and included a 'title' field that the Expense model does not define, so DRF rejected the create with 400.
issues.fix_location: frontend — 3 budget .tsx pages (Foundation/Scrum/Kanban budget) corrected to valid status/category enums and removed the 'title' field (commit b8c1c862)
